provenance.stage_attributes_source: APTITUDE Complete Map.csv (aptitude-course repository, database_of_course_curriculum), with the December 2025 supersessions recorded in that repository's CLAUDE.md: stage 4 aspect 'Community Love'; stage 8 color 'Teal', aspect 'True Self Connection', free-will archetype 'True Self Embodier'
provenance.extracted_from: in-repo vendored course markdown (backend/content/markdown/backup/ and *full-6-phase-wavelength-breakdown chapters)

stages.title: Survival
stages.subtitle: Active Yes-And-Ness
stages.free_will_description: Individuals are unaware of the concept of free will. Their actions are purely reactive and instinctual, driven by basic survival needs. This is the bottom of Maslow's Pyramid, the Root Chakra, the first stage Piaget's cognitive development or step one of Erikson's psychosocial development etc.

integrated.name: Commitment
integrated.description: A grounded promise to begin showing up.

shadow.name: Over-commitment
shadow.description: Taking on too much too fast.

integrated.name: Diligence
integrated.description: Steady effort anchored in habit and presence.

shadow.name: Thriving
shadow.description: Overextending in a rush of manic progress.

integrated.name: Steadiness
integrated.description: Returning to baseline without abandoning routine.

shadow.name: Burnout
shadow.description: Energetic collapse from unsustainable output.

integrated.name: Security
integrated.description: Embracing contraction to restore safety and trust.

shadow.name: Grasping
shadow.description: Clinging to momentum as it fades.

integrated.name: Stability
integrated.description: Deep stillness that anchors your nervous system.

shadow.name: Overwhelm
shadow.description: Flooded by unmet needs or collapsing structure.

integrated.name: Next Habit
integrated.description: Humble return with a manageable new step.

shadow.name: New Plan
shadow.description: Drastic overhaul to escape discomfort.

stages.title: Magick
stages.subtitle: Receptive Yes-And-Ness
stages.free_will_description: Individual personalities (collections of habits—which are frequently repeated behaviors) are the combined effort of archetypal role models, including everything from fictional characters to societal celebrities (and perhaps ancient gods in polytheistic cultures)

integrated.name: Inspiration
integrated.description: Guided by subtle symbols, dreams, or intuitive nudges.

shadow.name: Self-aggrandizement
shadow.description: Mistaking inspiration for spiritual superiority or specialness.

integrated.name: Attunement
integrated.description: In sync with feelings, symbols, and unseen rhythms.

shadow.name: Intoxication
shadow.description: Overwhelmed by meaning, chasing mystical highs.

integrated.name: Introspectivity
integrated.description: Quiet inner reflection and gentle emotional processing.

shadow.name: Anxiety
shadow.description: Flooded by feelings, uncertain what is real.

integrated.name: Coziness
integrated.description: Soft retreat into comfort, nesting, and gentle beauty.

shadow.name: Self-doubt
shadow.description: Losing confidence, questioning intuition and worth.

integrated.name: Fallow state
integrated.description: Restful emptiness, receptive to future renewal.

shadow.name: Self-loathing
shadow.description: Turning symbolic failure inward as shame.

integrated.name: Recuperation
integrated.description: Energy slowly returns; meaning begins to glimmer again.

shadow.name: Selfishness
shadow.description: Hoarding vitality instead of rejoining the collective vibe.

stages.title: Power
stages.subtitle: Self-Love
stages.free_will_description: Behavior is driven by a subconscious urge to alleviate the pain of emotions (that may or may not even be consciously noticed) that tell us that we are not enough. Without self-love toward these aversion based feelings, the tendency is to forge dominator "power over others."

integrated.name: Leading
integrated.description: Stepping forward with clarity and initiative.

shadow.name: Dominating
shadow.description: Steamrolling others to feel safe or seen.

integrated.name: Power-With
integrated.description: Collaborating with others while staying in your strength.

shadow.name: Power-Over
shadow.description: Asserting control to suppress difference or dissent.

integrated.name: Stepping Back
integrated.description: The courage to pause, reassess, and make room.

shadow.name: Crumbling
shadow.description: Losing grip, collapsing under the weight of unmet needs.

integrated.name: Humility
integrated.description: Recognizing your limits without shame.

shadow.name: Shame
shadow.description: Believing your worth depends on dominance or perfection.

integrated.name: Following
integrated.description: Willingly receiving leadership or guidance.

shadow.name: Subjugation
shadow.description: Losing yourself in order to avoid conflict or rejection.

integrated.name: Assembling
integrated.description: Rallying the right team, tools, and timing to re-engage.

shadow.name: Revenge
shadow.description: Re-entering the ring just to punish or prove.

stages.title: Conformity
stages.subtitle: Universal Love
stages.free_will_description: Behavior is determined by the attempt to meet the expectations of the relationships that the individual is embedded within; we are defined by roles: partners, parents, children, coworkers, friends, pupils, etc

integrated.name: Ambition
integrated.description: Reaching toward connection and community from fullness.

shadow.name: Voraciousness
shadow.description: Compulsive hunger for connection that clings and overshares.

integrated.name: Attunement
integrated.description: The felt sense of being in harmony with others.

shadow.name: Leprosy
shadow.description: Merging so fully you abandon yourself and burn out.

integrated.name: Discernment
integrated.description: Tuning in to your own truth about the relationship.

shadow.name: Self-Medication
shadow.description: Pulling back to numb and escape rather than reflect.

integrated.name: Conviction
integrated.description: Staying true to what you value even when it costs you.

shadow.name: Rage
shadow.description: Exploding and lashing out when you hit your limit.

integrated.name: Surrender
integrated.description: Releasing control and trusting the love is still there.

shadow.name: Misery
shadow.description: The despairing belief that you have been abandoned.

integrated.name: Catharsis
integrated.description: Emotional release that clears the system for new energy.

shadow.name: Self-Repression
shadow.description: Burying what needs release and restarting the cycle.

stages.title: Achievist
stages.subtitle: Intellectual Understanding
stages.free_will_description: Behavior is based on chasing things valued by the culture: money, wealth, status, privilege, fame… in short, achievement. Although the question may arise, Free Will is still uninteresting and left largely unconsidered

integrated.name: Hypothesize
integrated.description: Proposing a tentative answer and holding it lightly.

shadow.name: Assert
shadow.description: Declaring the answer and shutting collaboration down.

integrated.name: Experiment
integrated.description: Willingly trying something to see what you can learn.

shadow.name: Crusade
shadow.description: Evangelizing a hypothesis you have mistaken for truth.

integrated.name: Collect Data
integrated.description: Gathering the feedback and documenting what happened.

shadow.name: Overlook Details
shadow.description: Cherry-picking data and ignoring contrary evidence.

integrated.name: Analyze
integrated.description: Sitting with complexity to draw tentative conclusions.

shadow.name: Force It
shadow.description: Jamming the data into a conclusion that does not fit.

integrated.name: Synthesize
integrated.description: Integrating what you learned into a truer understanding.

shadow.name: Fail
shadow.description: Giving up and reading the low point as inadequacy.

integrated.name: Question
integrated.description: Returning to fresh curiosity for the next cycle.

shadow.name: Presume
shadow.description: Assuming you already know and skipping the inquiry.

stages.title: Pluralist
stages.subtitle: Embodied Understanding
stages.free_will_description: Behavior is driven by a desire to be virtuous, to apply rules fairly, to reduce the influence of hierarchy, and to respect everyone's perspectives. Free Will is still absent as behavior follows predictably from a set of pluralistic heuristics.

integrated.name: Connection
integrated.description: Showing up authentically and letting yourself be seen.

shadow.name: Oversharing
shadow.description: Trauma-dumping intensity mistaken for intimacy.

integrated.name: Belonging
integrated.description: Being fully yourself and fully accepted in community.

shadow.name: Megalomania
shadow.description: Making the group special and exclusionary.

integrated.name: Retirement
integrated.description: Consciously pulling back to replenish and rest.

shadow.name: Social Anxiety
shadow.description: Isolating from the fear of being seen and judged.

integrated.name: Unwinding
integrated.description: The natural release of tension after deep connection.

shadow.name: Alienation
shadow.description: The story that no one understands you and you are alone.

integrated.name: Repose
integrated.description: Deep rest and sacred solitude that feels full.

shadow.name: Isolation
shadow.description: The despairing belief that solitude is a sentence.

integrated.name: Vulnerability
integrated.description: Re-entering connection with open authenticity.

shadow.name: Bitterness
shadow.description: Re-entering guarded and resentful from old wounds.

stages.title: Integrative
stages.subtitle: Systems Wisdom
stages.free_will_description: The ability to reflect on all the influences of stages prior to Yellow develops and the individual becomes convinced that Free Will is essentially an illusion.

integrated.name: Focus
integrated.description: Bringing awareness to what matters and sustaining it.

shadow.name: Hyperfocus
shadow.description: Locking on so hard you lose peripheral awareness.

integrated.name: Concentration
integrated.description: Effortless unified absorption where the mind rests.

shadow.name: Obsession
shadow.description: Addiction to peak states you chase and grasp at.

integrated.name: Adjustment
integrated.description: Noticing you have drifted and gently course-correcting.

shadow.name: Stagnation
shadow.description: Awareness of being off course without any action.

integrated.name: Reorienting
integrated.description: Stepping back to reassess the approach and recalibrate.

shadow.name: Dithering
shadow.description: Endlessly changing course without ever committing.

integrated.name: Settling
integrated.description: Deep rest that comes from releasing all striving.

shadow.name: Depression
shadow.description: The hopeless belief that the low point is permanent.

integrated.name: Reset
integrated.description: Beginning again fresh without the last cycle's baggage.

shadow.name: Addiction
shadow.description: Reaching for a compulsive fix instead of a clean start.

stages.title: Nondual
stages.subtitle: Transcendent Wisdom
stages.free_will_description: Spiritual development that leads to an experience of the nondual nature of the Kosmos that allows the Adept to burn off karma, develop nonreactivity, break unhealthy and ineffective patterns, escape samsara and unbridle from determinism effectively.

integrated.name: Focus
integrated.description: Attention that gathers on its own, allowed not forced.

shadow.name: Hyperfocus
shadow.description: A tight, straining grip that constricts the body.

integrated.name: Concentration
integrated.description: Unified awareness recognized rather than achieved.

shadow.name: Obsession
shadow.description: The subtle grasp of preferring the state to continue.

integrated.name: Adjustment
integrated.description: Spontaneous return, since noticing itself is presence.

shadow.name: Stagnation
shadow.description: The false refuge of drifting under the guise of acceptance.

integrated.name: Reorienting
integrated.description: Effortlessly letting awareness recalibrate the path.

shadow.name: Dithering
shadow.description: Restlessly second-guessing without resting in any choice.

integrated.name: Settling
integrated.description: Resting as awareness itself with nothing to make happen.

shadow.name: Depression
shadow.description: Settling that has lost trust the wave will turn upward.

integrated.name: Reset
integrated.description: Renewing presence spontaneously as energy returns.

shadow.name: Addiction
shadow.description: Clinging to an old comfort instead of fresh re-engagement.

stages.title: Effortless Being
stages.subtitle: Unity of Being
stages.free_will_description: The obsession with "Free" Will of the previous two stages grows less all consuming and the goal becomes to subsume individual Will into alignment with the Will of Source. Blissful Union of Atman and Brahman.

integrated.name: Ascending
integrated.description: The natural deepening that comes from sustained practice.

shadow.name: Transcending
shadow.description: Spiritual bypass that escapes rather than includes life.

integrated.name: Clarity
integrated.description: Seeing reality as it is, as lived truth not concept.

shadow.name: Superiority
shadow.description: Using realization as proof you are better than others.

integrated.name: Discernment
integrated.description: Precise seeing of distinctions held with compassion.

shadow.name: Judgment
shadow.description: Using clarity to condemn, dismiss, and reject others.

integrated.name: Humility
integrated.description: Recognizing you are always the student before the mystery.

shadow.name: Humiliation
shadow.description: Collapsing into shame that you are not enough.

integrated.name: Devotion
integrated.description: Practicing because the practice itself is sacred.

shadow.name: Dogma
shadow.description: Mistaking your tradition for the one true path.

integrated.name: Recommitment
integrated.description: Choosing the path again out of love, not obligation.

shadow.name: Righteousness
shadow.description: Wielding devotion as a badge to judge others.

stages.title: Pure Awareness
stages.subtitle: Emptiness and Awareness
stages.free_will_description: There is no longer an individual who can have Free Will. This body becomes a perfect instrument of the evolution of consciousness, an empty Nobody who simply does the perfect thing in every situation—the thing that will result in the most spiritual growth for all involved.

integrated.name: Riding
integrated.description: Letting momentum carry you while staying rooted.

shadow.name: Grasping
shadow.description: Clutching at the returning energy and believing the hype.

integrated.name: Gratitude
integrated.description: Enjoying the flow fully and letting it pass in time.

shadow.name: Attachment
shadow.description: Clinging to the peak instead of releasing it.

integrated.name: Trust
integrated.description: Letting go as the descent unfolds its natural rhythm.

shadow.name: Collapse
shadow.description: Reading the natural ebb as failure and falling apart.

integrated.name: Patience
integrated.description: Knowing this too shall pass, having been here before.

shadow.name: Despair
shadow.description: Believing the trough is permanent and hopeless.

integrated.name: Rest
integrated.description: Ceasing to fix it and letting the ground hold you.

shadow.name: Fixing
shadow.description: Straining to repair the bottom instead of resting.

integrated.name: Recommitment
integrated.description: Returning to the same practice, path, and truth again.

shadow.name: Novelty-Seeking
shadow.description: Chasing something new instead of the proven path.
